steps.title: Total points of all 8 players
steps.content:
The total points scored by all 8 players is the mean multiplied by the number of players:
$$8 \times 14.5 = 116$$

steps.title: Highest score after removal
steps.content:
The sum of the remaining 7 players after removing the highest score is $$7 \times 12 = 84$$.
Subtracting this from the total gives the highest score: $$116 - 84 = 32$$.
That matches Choice C — 32- C.
